race.comment: Siding with the progressive UPSTAGE (6) who has won two on the bounce nicely, backing up the smart maiden win with a fast-finishing BM62 at Ballarat when dashing quickly off a slow speed. She can measure up off that effort and take beating again. CHERRY HILLS (13) won well on debut at Bendigo in what looked a handy maiden, she draws nicely and can go on with it in another suitable race. CHARMING DEEL (7) can mix her form a bit but put in a strong effort when last seen at Warrnambool on heavy ground, beaten under a length after leading. That was her first run for the Dabernig yard who might've got her back to her best. STREET LARK (11) hit the line nicely first up at Bendigo and can improve, she'll just need a touch of luck from the inside gate.
